mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE SET training_code_name = #{training_code_name}, remark = #{remark}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_id = #{modify_id} WHERE training_code_id = #{training_code_id} AND training_group_id = #{training_group_id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE training_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV' AND training_code_id != '--' ORDER BY print_seq
SELECT * FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE training_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV' AND training_code_id = #{training_code_id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE ( training_group_id, training_code_id, training_code_name, print_seq, add_id, modify_id ) VALUES ( 'GROUP_DIV', #{training_code_id}, #{training_code_name}, #{print_seq}, #{add_id}, #{modify_id} )
mapper.update: UPDATE TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE SET training_code_name = #{training_code_name}, print_seq = #{print_seq}, modify_date = SYSDATE, modify_id = #{modify_id} WHERE training_code_id = #{training_code_id} AND training_group_id = 'GROUP_DIV'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE training_code_id = '--' ORDER BY up_training_code_id
SELECT * FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE training_code_id = '--' AND training_group_id = #{training_group_id}
SELECT training_code_name, training_code_id , print_seq, training_group_id FROM TRAINING_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE training_group_id = #{training_group_id} AND training_code_id <> '--' ORDER BY print_seq
